# Japhette Alec Pulido — Operations Manager & Executive Virtual Assistant

## Who I Am
Japhette Alec Pulido is an IT-trained Operations Manager and Executive Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines (UTC+8) with 14+ years of professional experience. He holds a BS in Information Technology with a Major in System Engineering. He is the rare combination of technical IT background and executive-level administrative expertise.

His core differentiator: he does not just run workflows — he builds, documents, and automates them using AI tools, CRM systems, and version-controlled infrastructure.

## Contact
- Email: jap.pulido789@gmail.com
- Viber: 09569027896
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/japhette-alec-pulido
- Portfolio: https://japhette789.github.io/japhette-vms.github.io

## Availability
- Timezone: Philippine Standard Time (PST), UTC+8
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8AM–6PM PHT, flexible for US/EU time zones
- Open to: Full-Time Remote Roles, Part-Time Retainer, Project-Based Engagements

## Services Offered
1. Executive VA Support — inbox filtering, calendar management, client database administration
2. AI SOP Engineering — building standard operating procedures using Google Gemini, ChatGPT, Claude
3. CRM Directory Audits — cleaning, deduplicating, and migrating lead databases (Salesforce, HubSpot)
4. Multi-Channel Customer Support — Zendesk ticket routing, SLA management (144k+ tickets routed)
5. Financial Reconciliation — billing, refunds, cancellation processing (100% accuracy record)
6. Remote Team Coordination — Slack, Discord, Lark Suite setup and management
7. Technical Staff Training — onboarding, SOP training, platform configuration
8. Proposal Architecture — pre-sales documents, contract formatting, pipeline analysis
9. Workflow Automation — Notion, ClickUp, Git/GitHub version control

## Key Metrics
- 14+ years of professional experience
- 40% reduction in admin overhead delivered to clients
- 144,000+ support tickets routed
- 10,000+ CRM lead records audited and cleaned
- 3 full CRM migration projects completed
- 50+ SOP manuals authored
- 100+ AI SOP frameworks built
- 98% customer satisfaction rating
- 0% database entry errors
- 0 missed executive milestones
- 30+ remote staff trained
- 15+ platforms integrated

## Tools & Platforms
Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Zendesk, Salesforce CRM, Calendly, Slack, Notion, ClickUp, ChatGPT, Claude (Anthropic), Google Gemini, SAP ERP, Discord, Lark Suite, Canva, Git/GitHub Pages

## Work History

### General Virtual Assistant — Fit Body Boot Camp (Aug 2023 – May 2026)
Supervised lead generation pipelines, managed 10,000+ client records, handled billing/refunds with 100% accuracy, authored SOP library using AI tools, reduced admin overhead by 40%.

### Customer Service Representative — Inspiro / 1800 Flowers (Apr 2023 – Aug 2023)
Handled high-volume inbound support during peak holiday cycles, maintained 98% satisfaction score, processed orders and escalations under strict SLA constraints.

### Principal Consultant & Owner — WJ Construction & Engineering Services (Sept 2012 – Present)
Led all business operations, managed remote and local technical staff, implemented AI-powered SOPs, conducted staff training workshops.

### Pre-Sales Engineer — Phoenix Solutions (May 2012 – July 2012)
Compiled commercial proposals, assessed client technical constraints, analyzed sales pipeline data.

## Education
BS Information Technology, Major in System Engineering
